title_raw: THE CHITTAGONG HILL-TRACTS LAWS (No. IV) REGULATION, 1942
title_normalized: THE CHITTAGONG HILL-TRACTS LAWS (No. IV) REGULATION, 1942
content_raw:
THE CHITTAGONG HILL-TRACTS LAWS (No. IV) REGULATION, 1942

                        
                        
                    
                    
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                             (BENGAL REGULATION V OF 1942)

A Regulation to apply the Forest Act, 1927, to the Chittagong Hill-tracts and further to amend the Chittagong Hill-tracts Regulation, 1900.

                                    
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                        
                            
                            
                                

 WHEREAS it is expedient to apply the Forest Act,  1927, to the Chittagong Hill-tracts and further to amend the Chittagong Hill-tracts Regulation, 1900, for the purpose and in the manner hereinafter appearing;

XVI of 1927 Regulation I of 1900      It is hereby enacted as follows:-

A Regulation to apply the Forest Act, 1927, to the Chittagong Hill-tracts and further to amend the Chittagong Hill-tracts Regulation, 1900.

Short title
1. This Regulation may be called THE CHITTAGONG HILL-TRACTS LAWS (No. IV) REGULATION, 1942.

Application of Act XVI of 1927 to the Chittagong Hill-tracts
2. The Forest Act, 1927 (hereinafter  referred to  as  the said Act), shall apply to the Chittagong Hill-tracts and shall be deemed to have applied to the said tracts with effect from the twenty-first day of September, 1927.

Validation of certain notifications rules and action
3. Any notification purporting to have been issued or any rule or order purporting to have been made or any other action purporting to have been taken under the said Act before the Commencement of this Regulation shall be deemed to be as valid as if it had been issued, made or taken under the said Act as applied to the said tracts by this Regulation.

Amendment of the Schedule, Regulation I of 1900
4. In the Schedule to the Chittagong Hill-tracts Regulation, 1900, all the entries relating to the Indian Forest Act, 1878, shall be omitted.
